name: card
title: Card
description: A semantic compound card family with real list collections, selectable heading levels, shared spacing, full-bleed or inset media, and responsive RTL-safe flag layouts.
useWhen: Presenting a collection of self-contained summaries that link to more detailed information
Grouping one subject's heading, description, media, actions, and supporting content
Showing media-led summaries in vertical or responsive horizontal flag layouts
avoidWhen: Presenting tabular records or values that users need to compare across rows
Wrapping continuous prose that should be read sequentially
Using a border or shadow only for decoration without a self-contained subject
Making the entire card a hidden click target while it also contains other interactive controls

keyboard: Card and its structural slots add no keyboard behavior or tab stops
CardGroup is a real list so assistive technology announces the number of cards
CardTitle renders the consumer-selected heading level without skipping the document outline
Links and buttons inside a card retain native keyboard behavior and visible focus indicators
Horizontal media is moved with CSS grid while heading, media, content, and footer stay in logical DOM order
accessibility.targetSize: Inherited from interactive descendants; Card itself is not a control
